feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Testing and Analysis
feed.subtitle: ABAP Testing and Analysis Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Grc request workflow
entry.content: Hi I have a problem in grc request, the request came to admin_detour because some approves are missing and I need to see complete stage of particular request workflow so I can find who is inactive in previous path.As it is in admin_detour we are only able to pending approver as our names but I need to see previous path approvers details,is there any log we can get to see complete log for particular grc request

entry.title: Execute JavaScript method( window.open ) from ABAP
entry.content:
Hi All ! 

Is it possible to execute JavaScript Method 'window.open' with ABAP? 
I've checked the demo program( DEMO_JAVA_SCRIPT_MINI_EDITOR ) and class( CL_JAVA_SCRIPT ) provided by SAP, but seems that it doesn't work.
( It seems that the JS was compiled, but not executed )

I'd like to refresh Groupware Web Page after the transaction executed on Web Gui pop-up
and the groupware web page manager asked me to execute JS method since the domain of groupware 
and web gui are different. And that's the only possible way at the moment.

In short, I'd like to confirm whether JS code can be executed on AP server which is NOT ABAP.
Or is there any other way besides what was mentioned above? 
I am trying with other class cl_gui_html_viewer  any way 😂

Please help! 
Thanks! 😀

entry.title: ATC Configurator app F4712 - Target not found error
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to enable ATC configurator app in the BTP ABAP (Free tier) environment.  Followed the below help page to enable this app.  

Enable Usage of the ABAP Test Cockpit Configurator App | SAP Help Portal

The app is visible but on clicking on the app, it gives the below error.

Target was not found.Error: adding element with duplicate id 'nw.core.aps.atc.config::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport.view.ListReport::configuration--action::'

Is there any other additional authorization to be added for this app to work?  If any of you have faced this and resolved this error.  

This is only happening for this app, other apps like ATC exemptions, Custom code migration app are working fine.

entry.title: Skipping invoice creation in background batch job (using program SDBILLDL)
entry.content:
While creating an invoice through SDBILLDL via job - we have to check error log. If any error is there while creating invoice, we should restrict the system not to create an invoice for that particular document and should continue for the rest of the documents. Also, that error message should be displayed in batch job log.

Here is an example:

Delivery documents: say 1,2,3

1-Invoice should generate

2-Invoice should not get generate because there is an error in line Item Material

3-Invoice should generate.

entry.title: Generate token using authorization tab error
entry.content:
Hi,

I have an API to generate token and when executing form postman I am passing the username and password in the authorization tab and passing some grant type in body tab from postman and generating the token successfully. But when I am writing the same from ABAP it is not working. Experts, can you please suggest if I am missing something.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: ATC Central Remote Server - Roadmap
entry.content:
Hi fellow developers,

I have a question on the ATC Roadmap in the scenario of a Central Remote Check Setup.

A minumum of NW 7.51/7.52 is required when we must use it for remote checks for say an S/4HANA Readiness assesment. If we look at the roadmap for NW 7.52, its standard support is till the year 2027 after which S/4 Foundation is the successor. However, S/4 Foundation can only be used in conjuction with a license like S/4HANA. 

So my question is, what is the future of the ATC as a remote stand alone system? Are we supposed to move to ATC on BTP if we want such a setup? Or merge it with a system which has S/4HANA?

@OlgaDolinskaja  / @thomas_jung your views would be appreciated here. 

 

Regards,

J.

entry.title: Which one is best option badi or customer exit
entry.content: i have a badi and customer exit available for a requirement which one is better.

entry.title: DDIC_TYPE_INCONSISTENCY occured WPMARA
entry.content:
Could any help me on this, I have gone through this short dump while executing the Extended Bapi.

Actually, I have created two fields in MARA table like Phone_no and Email_Id and trying to create a new record including Key field and these Phone_no and Email_Id in MARA table by uploading flat file.

But, i have got this error, could any one help me on this error.

Category Internal Kernel Error
Runtime Errors DDIC_TYPE_INCONSISTENCY
Application Component Not assigned
Date and Time 27.03.2024 11:27:24

 

Short Text
Inconsistency in the dictionary for the structure "WPMARA".

 

What happened?
Error in the SAP kernel

The current ABAP program "SAPLMGML" had to be terminated because the A
processor detected a system error.

 

Error analysis
There is an internal system error.

There is an inconsisteny for the DDIC structure "WPMARA", the correspo
Dictionary runtime object (NAMETAB) is incorrect.

The number of components of the structure (NAMETAB component "fldcnt")
is specified as 239. If all the substructures are resolved and the
actual total number of components is calculated recursively, a differe
value is returned.

 

Trigger Location of Runtime Error
Program SAPLMGML
Include MM03CHNG
Row 10

entry.title: How to move material from 311 movement type to 261 movement type by using BAPI_PRODORDCONF_CREATE_TT
entry.content:
Hi expert,

We need to schedule a job to make automate process to move 311 movement type to 261 movement type by using BAPI_PRODORDCONF_CREATE_TT.

We have to take input to BAPI_PRODORDCONF_CREATE_TT from below logic which contains 311 movement type data.

    

    DATA lt_matkl   TYPE tt_matkl.
    DATA lv_plant   TYPE werks_d.
    DATA lv_project TYPE xblnr.
    CONSTANTS : lc_m10 TYPE werks_d VALUE 'M10',
                lc_m14 TYPE werks_d VALUE 'M14'.

    IF iv_key   = 'M14CPMAT'.
      lv_plant = lc_m14.
    ELSEIF iv_key = 'M10CPMAT'.
      lv_plant = lc_m10.
    ENDIF.

    SELECT project,
       concat( concat( site, '-' ), project ) AS title
       FROM zct_project
       WHERE site = @LV_plant
       AND job = 1
       INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_project).

    READ TABLE lt_project INTO DATA(ls_project) INDEX 1.
    lv_project = ls_project-project.
    ev_title   = ls_project-title.

    SELECT marc~matnr,
           makt~maktx,
           t023t~matkl,
           t023t~wgbez,
           t023t~wgbez60,
           mard~lgort,
           mseg~erfmg,
     CASE
      WHEN mbew~vprsv = 'V' THEN mseg~erfmg * mbew~verpr
      WHEN mbew~vprsv = 'S' THEN mseg~erfmg * mbew~stprs
      END AS Amount,
           mkpf~mblnr,
           mkpf~bktxt,
           mkpf~budat
       FROM marc
         INNER JOIN makt ON marc~matnr = makt~matnr
         INNER JOIN mard ON makt~matnr = mard~matnr
         INNER JOIN mbew ON mard~matnr = mbew~matnr
         INNER JOIN mara ON mara~matnr = mbew~matnr
         INNER JOIN t023t ON mara~matkl = t023t~matkl
         INNER JOIN mseg ON marc~matnr = mseg~matnr
         INNER JOIN mkpf ON mseg~mblnr = mkpf~mblnr

       WHERE mseg~erfmg IS NOT INITIAL
         AND  mard~lgort = '600'
         AND  mseg~lgort = mard~lgort
         AND  mseg~bwart = '311'
         AND  mkpf~bktxt = @LV_project
         AND  marc~werks = @LV_plant
         AND  mseg~werks = marc~werks
         AND  marc~werks = mard~werks
         AND  marc~werks = mbew~bwkey ORDER BY t023t~matkl ASCENDING
      INTO TABLE @ET_cpmat.

We checked and found that order number and plant is mandatory for mentioned Bapi.

Order number is created by a person in plant, and we are not able find out table name of this order number.

Where to find the table against the order number.

Kindly advise.

entry.title: Material memo text is no longer working in S4 HANA version
entry.content:
Hello,

We had configurated some Material memo texts which were pop up un VA01 when we created a new Sales Doc. with these materials. The points is we have migrated our systems to S4 Hana and since these functionality is not working, we have a mirror system as a copy of our previous system and there is still working. I have debugged it and the problem comes with this standard FM which no longer finds the text despite it exists in STXH table: 
this is where the problem comes from: I also saw that this FM have changed a lot in this newer version. 

and more concretely this select 

The only parameter which I could be suspecting is the language one:

the others are perfect.

But I'm unable to see why it is not finding the text related since I can see in the table the text we are looking for.

Any idea?

entry.title: SAP & Outsystems - Call custom function module
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

I'm trying to call a custom function module that I've created in a SAP system from Outsystems, but the function does not appear in the Outsystems menu when i try to test it. 

Here in this client, they've another machine were they can call some functions from SAP as you can see in the print: 

 

Can someone help me understand what I might be doing wrong?

Or I'm thinking in the wrong way and this is not possible?

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: How to set an Aactive ATC run in ATC result browser in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have a question I have recently started using the ATC possibilities in Eclipse I am connected to an S4 System and was wonderrring how this section in Eclipse gets filled 

Is it possible to run an ATC i the TCODE ATC in the GUI and get the results over here?

Thanks you for reading.

entry.title: Select query date feild in not working
entry.content: I given greater than equal to condition in select query but still its fetching old records

entry.title: Need documentation on ABP changes when upgrading from SAP 4.7 to ERP 6
entry.content: Hello, We are getting ready to upgrade from SAP 4.7 to ECC 6.0. Where can I find ABAP changes, what's obsolete, etc?

entry.title: Custom Partner Function is deleted after saving
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Asking for your expertise on a problem I encountered. In VA01, when I save the sales document, the custom partner function is deleted. When looking in MV45AFZZ, I can't seem to find where this deletion of partner function is happening. 

I already tried debugging in USER_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE and USER_SAVE_DOCUMENT but no deletion happened. Wanted to know if you have any idea how to approach this type of problem.

entry.title: scheduling agreement - Output issue
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I need your support to understand and solve an issue related to Scheduling agreement, suddenly, the SA release copy was received by another user. However, no one updated the order from the planning side, yet the order was still received.

SA release copy email should be received by user who creates/modifies it.

Could you please guide how to solve this issue?

Thank you,

entry.title: eCATT. SAP Strategy.
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can someone let me know if SAP has a specific roadmap for eCATT as a tool?

I mean, eCATT will be supported for future SAP_BASIS releases?

Are there new strategies from SAP to provide other Testing & Automation Tools?

Thank you,
Alfonso.

ABAP Testing and Analysis

entry.title: Curious question about the custom code analysis, scoping and adaptation
entry.content:
Hi,

Recently we started S4 Conversion migration topic. At this moment we have activated the custom code usage tracking(SCMON) in prod systems couple of weeks back. On the other hand also, we had run the ATC with central ATC system (NW 7.51) despite the recommended is 7.52 version. The ATC resulted something like below for our ERP dev system

  • around 80K prio 1
  • around 12k prio 2
  • around 60K prio 3

We used S4HANA_READINESS_REMOTE check variant for ATC run. Out of these 150K items, the categorization is roughly as below.

So we have downloaded the result list and found some interesting topics and along with few open questions to check with the community as below.

1. Out of 150K check items, there are 132K duplicates found and only 27K are unique records. Not sure why so many duplicate was reported in ATC result. Does this is common behavior in ATC findings? 

2. After excluding $TMP objects the final unique came around 12K check items. So, I'm curious to know now how many items of this we can do the adaptation before SUM and how do we need to categorize those which can be done with S4HANA upgradation?

3. I agree we need to wait few more months of SCMON data from the productive system, but once that is ready how do we need to exclude those from ATC result list to focus only the final scope of custom code to do adaptation during preperation and realization phase.

4. Does there any general recommendation on what is the best practice to do estimation and potential changes that need to be done for each of 6 different check categories in this check variant? This is crucial for us to do the effort estimation with t-shirt sizing to know roughly which type of check message is needed how much time and how the change looks like in general for each of this check message type.

5. Any help document from SAP about Prio1 , 2 & 3 about it's definition. Which one it's must to fix for conversion project? I remember Thomas Fiedler mentioned that prio 1 and 2 is must to fix. Not sure is this still valid statement or not.

6. If we don't use NW 7.52 for remote ATC, do we see the difference in ATC result list or it's only the UI (like more statistic categories) differences which help to analyze the AT result?

Best Regards,

Praveen

entry.title: CSAP_ORD_BOM_CREATE issue
entry.content:
I try to run the BAPI function CSAP_ORD_BOM_DELETE by setting value of 

  • "ORDER"
  • "POSITION"
  • "MATERIAL"
  • "PLANT"
  • "BOM_USAGE"

But the exception happened with AbapMessageClass = "29" and AbapMessageNumber = "853"  (Message Short Text: Data is incomplete).

Please kindly support what's the problem. Many thanks!

entry.title: Fuzzy Search in cds query
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is it possible to use fuzzy searches (*, %, ?, etc.) in the input parameters of Analysis using CDS View as the data source?

Now I get an error saying pattern selection is not supported.
If possible, please let me know how to implement it.

Best Regards,
